data.title: Elon Musk's Tesla Set For Lowest Quarterly Deliveries Since 2022, JPMorgan Predicts: 'Brand Has Lost So Much Value So Quickly'
data.description: JPMorgan analysts forecast Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) to experience its weakest quarter for car deliveries since 2022.

data.title: EPA Moves To Overturn Biden-Era Climate Policies, Starts Process To Reverse Passenger Vehicle, Truck Emission Rules
Trump Wants No Tax For Americans Making Less Than $150,000 A Year, Says Howard Lutnick: 'That's What I'm Working For'
data.description: Trump Wants No Tax For Anybody Making Less Than $150,000 a year, Says Howard Lutnick. 'That's What I'm Working For'

data.title: Marjorie Taylor Greene Demands FBI Probe Into 'Wave Of Organized Attacks' On Tesla —Questions Possible Democrat-NGO Ties
data.description: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-Ga.) and fellow House Subcommittee on Delivering on Government Efficiency members have called for a federal investigation into what they describe as "organized attacks" targeting Tesla Inc. and CEO Elon Musk, questioning potential connections to Democrat-leaning organizations.

data.title: Peter Schiff Warns Americans Will Be Harmed Most When Bitcoin Bubble Pops, Says US Has Biggest Crypto Lobby
data.description: Economist and market commentator Peter Schiff warned on Wednesday that Americans would bear the brunt of the impact should the Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) “bubble” burst.
